product_name: Thales Luna Cloud HSM (DPoD) / Thales TCT Luna T-Series HSMs
product_brief: High-assurance cloud and hardware security modules integrating NIST-standardized PQC algorithms for key management and PKI.
pqc_support: Yes (with details: Integrates ML-KEM, ML-DSA, LMS/HSS; supports hybrid modes)
pqc_capability_description: Luna HSMs are among the first FIPS 140-3 Level 3 platforms to integrate NIST-standardized PQC algorithms (ML-KEM, ML-DSA, LMS/HSS) directly in firmware. Supports quantum-safe key management, TLS, PKI, and code signing on production-proven systems with hybridization capabilities.
crypto_primitives: ML-KEM, ML-DSA, LMS, HSS, Falcon (FN-DSA), RSA, ECC
key_management_model: HSM-backed key management with crypto-agility; supports customer-managed keys via PKCS#11 and GlobalPlatform standards.
latest_version: MultiApp v5.2 Premium PQC (Smartcard); Luna T-Series (HSM version not specified)
fips_validated: Yes (FIPS 140-3 Level 3 for Luna HSMs; Falcon is FIPS 206)
primary_platforms: Cloud infrastructures, U.S. Government intelligence/defense/civilian agencies, commercial enterprises, mobile networks (5G), embedded environments
target_industries: Finance, Government, Defense, Telecom, Identity Management, Critical Infrastructure
regulatory_status: ANSSI-certified at CC EAL6+ (MultiApp); FIPS 140-3 Level 3; CNSA 2.0 compliant roadmap
pqc_roadmap_details: Migration to PQC between 2024 and 2033 per NSA CNSA 2.0; Java Card standard v3.3 with PQC support planned for 2026; ongoing integration of NIST standards (ML-KEM, ML-DSA) across portfolio.
signature_schemes: Falcon (FN-DSA), ML-DSA, LMS, HSS, ECDSA (legacy), RSA (legacy)
